description: Vietnamese AI-writing tells. The fingerprint of AI-drafted or machine-translated Vietnamese is Hán-Việt overuse and calque connectors: stiff Sino-Vietnamese verbs and 'in the case of'-style openers where plain Vietnamese is simpler and warmer. Edit this list to fit your house style.

rules.hint: Calque of 'in the case of'. Use «nếu».
Calque opener. Often deletable; just name the topic.
Formal connector. Often deletable, or use «nên».
Meta filler ('this article will...'). Delete it; start with the point.
Bureaucratic filler. Drop it, or name the actual rule.
